title: Bare Workbenches (Bare Bones x Enhanced Workbenches)
description: Retextures in the unique style of the Bare Bones resource pack the Enhanced Workbenches mod from the Red Logic Series!
body:
### Simplify your Workbench!!!
This resource pack adds compatibility between the Bare Bones resource pack and the Enhanced Workbenches mod

## Credits:
- 
  [Enhanced Workbenches Mod by Luligabi1](https://modrinth.com/mod/enhanced-workbenches)
- 
  [Bare Bones Textures By RobotPants](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones)
- Original Crafting Station concept taked from [Tinker's Construct by mDiyo](https://modrinth.com/mod/tinkers-construct)
- Original Project Table concept taked from [Red Power 2 Series by Eloraam](https://modrinth.com/mod/redpower2-core)
